description_long: This is a large, modern suburban house surrounded by a perimeter fence and landscaped with palm trees and shrubs. The structure features multiple interconnected volumes with varying roof heights, primarily hip and gable roofs, and a light gray exterior. The property includes a driveway leading to a garage, a prominent front entryway with steps, and a backyard with a swimming pool and patio area. Windows are arranged in both symmetrical and asymmetrical patterns, with several large panes and smaller, regularly spaced windows. The house appears to have two main stories, with a mix of flat and sloped roof sections, and several outdoor living spaces. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on open, airy spaces.
description: A large, modern two-story house with hip and gable roofs, landscaped yard, and a backyard pool, surrounded by a fence. The exterior is light gray with multiple windows and a prominent entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entryway with steps, driveway, and landscaped front yard with palm trees.
description_view_1: Rear angled view highlighting the backyard, swimming pool, and patio area, as well as the garage and side entry.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the full length of the house, backyard pool, and the arrangement of windows and rooflines.
description_view_3: Back view focusing on the pool area, rear patio, and the overall layout of the house within the fenced yard.
attribute_window_arrangement: mixed symmetrical and asymmetrical placement with large and small windows
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway with steps, covered porch, and a prominent front door flanked by columns and landscaping
